# Vue Reactivity Fundamentals

> Raw source preserved verbatim. Do not edit this file.
> Compiled into wiki articles during the ingest stage.

---

Vue's reactivity system tracks dependencies through JavaScript Proxies.
State declared with ref() and reactive() is observed transparently; effects
re-run when their tracked dependencies change.
